title: IC2Additions
description: IC2ex Addon which adds bunch of new things related to the main mod
body:
IC2Additions is an add-on for IC2ex that gives you a bunch of fresh stuff to play with. It's all about making your tech progress smoother and the late game more fun.

**Please run the game without Advanced Solar Panels and Gravisuite**

New Energy Storage: old MFSU cannot handle late game technologies, they are short of space, energy input/output. So we added new Plasmatron, Auraton, Quantum, and Photon

New Crystals: New energy crystals with higher power tiers and capacity. They are used in extended crafting

New Tools: New energy power drills for a better mining experience: Advanced drill, Nano drill, Quantum drill, Vajra, and Advanced Vajra

Weapons/Armor: Strong gear and swords to help you survive basically anything: Advanced nano suit, Advanced quant, and the most powerfull is Molecular Armor.

New Items: various items from forgotten IC2 addons, such as sanarium. We also added new ways of getting energy from reactors: Neptunium, Thorium, Californium

This mode will update as soon as I have a free time.

Goodluck with mining, soldier.

Please join our discord for if you want to help: https://discord.gg/WU2ZYFzA7M
